models.name: DeepHermes-3-Llama-3-3B-Preview-4bit
models.purpose: Primary runtime LLM — synthesis, decision, planning, hypothesis generation (F217C swap: DeepHermes primary, Hermes rollback)
models.lifecycle: Singleton per session. Lazy load on first synthesis call. Unload on branch timeout or memory pressure.
notes: F217C swap: DeepHermes is production primary (mlx-community/DeepHermes-3-Llama-3-3B-Preview-4bit)
Hermes-3-Llama-3.2-3B-4bit remains rollback/fallback only
KV quantization at generate time: max_kv_size=8192, kv_bits=4
mlx_lm.load() with lazy=True, no cache limit set at load time

models.name: answerdotai-ModernBERT-base-6bit
models.purpose: Text embedding for semantic dedup and RAG
models.lifecycle: Deferred singleton via _ModernBERTMLXLoader. Loaded on first embed request.
notes: DRIFT: 4 different ModernBERT IDs across codebase — see Section C
Output: 768-dimensional dense vectors
Also available via mlx-community/nomic-ai-ModernBERT-base-4bit for ANE path

models.name: knowledgator/gliner-relex-large-v0.5
models.purpose: Named entity recognition and entity-relation extraction
models.lifecycle: Lazy load on first NER call via _create_gliner_engine(). Loaded once, cached.
notes: CRITICAL CONFLICT: config.py and project_types.py specify gliner-x-base; runtime loads gliner-relex-large-v0.5
gliner-x-base in config is DISK-ONLY (never loaded by runtime code)

models.name: ms-marco-MiniLM-L-12-v2
models.purpose: Query-document relevance reranking for synthesis results
models.lifecycle: Singleton via _get_flashrank_ranker(). Loaded once on first use.
notes: ~4MB ONNX model — very lightweight
Windup-local (synthesis_runner scope, not runtime-wide)

models.name: Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct-4bit
models.purpose: Windup-local lightweight synthesis and claim verification
notes: Windup-local plane — separate from runtime-wide Hermes model plane
SmolLM2-135M is fallback (weight 0.2) when Qwen unavailable

models.name: SmolLM2-135M-Instruct
models.purpose: Fallback windup model when Qwen2.5-0.5B unavailable
models.lifecycle: Loaded only when Qwen2.5-0.5B fails. Weight 0.2.
notes: Smallest model in system — ~135M parameters
Windup-local plane only

models.name: *(removed — M1 8GB unsafe)*
models.purpose: Image analysis — evidence triage, document OCR, screenshot interpretation
models.lifecycle: VLMAnalyzer singleton. Loaded on first image request.
notes: Lazy singleton in VLMAnalyzer
M1 memory guard at >85% RAM blocks loading

models.name: apple/mobileclip-s0
models.purpose: Image→embedding for text↔image similarity in MambaFusion
models.lifecycle: Loaded on first image encode request
notes: CoreML .mlpackage for ANE acceleration
MLX fallback for non-ANE paths

models.name: MambaFusion
models.purpose: Fuses image and text embeddings for evidence similarity scoring
models.lifecycle: Loaded on first fusion call. MLP fallback if nn.Mamba unavailable.
notes: MLP fallback is default when Mamba not available
nn.Mamba selected when mlx-lm provides it

models.name: apple/mobileclip-s0
models.purpose: Text↔image similarity scoring in multimodal pipeline
notes: Same model as vision-encoder — shared artifact
Used for text↔image retrieval

models.name: BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5
models.purpose: Fallback embedding for RAG when MLX embeddings unavailable
models.lifecycle: Lazy load in RAG engine. Only loaded if MLX path fails.
notes: 384-dimensional (smaller than ModernBERT's 768d)
Pure Python fallback — not MLX

models.name: qwen2.5-0.5b (draft branch)
models.purpose: Draft tokens for speculative decoding against Hermes-3 main model
models.lifecycle: Loaded lazily on first speculative decode call
notes: SPECULATIVE DRAFT ONLY — not a standalone model plane
Draft branch: hermes3_engine lines 193-194, 764-802
Not independently gated by model_manager

models.name: microsoft/trocr-base-handwritten
connected_to: Unknown — ocr_model field defined but not verified in runtime
models.lifecycle: UNVERIFIED — defined in project_types.py but not confirmed in runtime
notes: UNVERIFIED USAGE — ocr_model field exists in ModelConfig but no grep hit confirms loading call
May be unused or only conditionally loaded

conflicts.description: config.py and project_types.py specify 'gliner-x-base'; runtime code loads 'gliner-relex-large-v0.5'
4 different ModernBERT model IDs across codebase
Windup-local Qwen/SmolLM plane is separate from runtime Hermes plane — different scopes, different loading paths
ocr_model defined in project_types.py but no confirmed loading call
Draft speculative model in hermes3_engine is not independently gated by model_manager lifecycle
deduplication.py uses nomic-embed-text-v1.5 while MLX embedding pipeline uses answerdotai-ModernBERT-base-6bit
ane_embedder uses different ModernBERT ID than core/mlx_embeddings.py

recommendations.title: Resolve GLiNER model name conflict
recommendations.description: config.py and project_types.py specify gliner-x-base but runtime loads gliner-relex-large-v0.5. Pick one canonical ID and update all references.

recommendations.title: Consolidate ModernBERT model IDs
recommendations.description: 4 different ModernBERT IDs across codebase. Pick 1-2 canonical IDs and update all references to point to the same model.

recommendations.title: Verify or remove trocr model reference
recommendations.description: ocr_model field in project_types.py has no confirmed loading call. Verify it is actually used or remove the dead reference.

recommendations.title: Formalize windup-local model plane
recommendations.description: Qwen/SmolLM windup models are loaded via _ensure_model() in synthesis_runner but not tracked in model_manager. Document the separation or integrate them into the canonical lifecycle.

recommendations.title: Gate draft speculative model under model_manager
recommendations.description: Draft model for speculative decoding is set in hermes3_engine but not tracked by model_manager lifecycle. Either integrate it or document why it doesn't need lifecycle management.

recommendations.title: Document FlashRank singleton ownership
recommendations.description: FlashRank is loaded via _get_flashrank_ranker() in synthesis_runner and reranker.py but not tracked in model_manager. Confirm it should be excluded from canonical lifecycle.

recommendations.title: Align deduplication embedding model with MLX embedding pipeline
recommendations.description: deduplication.py uses nomic-embed-text-v1.5 while MLX pipeline uses answerdotai-ModernBERT-base-6bit. These produce different embeddings — align them.

recommendations.title: Add tokenizer_claim field to model_manager
recommendations.description: Tokenizers are loaded implicitly but not tracked. Add explicit tokenizer_claim field to each model entry in PHASE_MODEL_MAP for clarity.

recommendations.title: Document ANE/CoreML model path in model_manager
recommendations.description: brain/ane_embedder.py loads CoreML models but bypasses model_manager. Document why ANE path doesn't need canonical lifecycle tracking.

recommendations.title: Add model_id to all model config dataclasses
recommendations.description: project_types.py ModelConfig has model_name fields but no canonical model_id. Add explicit model_id matching PHASE_MODEL_MAP keys for traceability.
